name: Julius
bio:
Undead, Skeleton Archer. Once an archer, he became an undead after death and joined the Vampire Castle to seek restoration of his human form.

Role: Physical Penetration
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals Physical Damage to multiple enemies and ignores a certain amount of the target's Defense.

skillSlots.name: Spirit Flame
skillSlots.description: Attacks 2 random enemy targets, dealing 122% P.DMG while ignoring 15% of targets' DEF.

skillSlots.name: Power of the Fallen
skillSlots.description: Increases ATK by 10% and HP by 5%.
